allies.rationale_text: Latticework-of-mental-models strengthens systems-thinking by insisting that complex problems be viewed through interrelationships rather than one isolated specialty frame.
allies.source_quote: reality does not isolate itself into discrete academic disciplines

allies.rationale_text: First-principles-thinking helps latticework-of-mental-models avoid becoming a collection of elegant slogans by forcing reconstruction from fundamentals.
allies.source_quote: the facts do not hang together in a usable form unless they are arrayed on a latticework of theory

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias weakens latticework-of-mental-models when teams use many models cosmetically but still protect the worldview they already prefer.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Latticework-of-mental-models conflicts with simplification when accumulating frameworks adds analytical overhead that delays the simple decision one model alone would have reached.
structured_tensions.source_quote: latticework-of-mental-models conflicts with simplification (simplification) when accumulating frameworks adds analytical overhead that delays the simple decision one model alone would have reached.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Latticework-of-mental-models conflicts with specialization when breadth across disciplines prevents the depth needed to apply any single model with operational precision.
structured_tensions.source_quote: latticework-of-mental-models conflicts with specialization (specialization) when breadth across disciplines prevents the depth needed to apply any single model with operational precision.

curation_notes.summary: Relation surface stays inside the current graph vocabulary and keeps omission stronger than weak forcing.
donor_drops: Did not widen Wave 3 target ids or import donor-shaped relation neighborhoods to rescue weak local grounding.
open_questions: Some source-real neighbors remain omitted because the current graph vocabulary would force weaker mappings than this conservative pass allows.

allies: Wave 4 candidacy remains observational only and is noted only in batch artifacts.
antagonists: No multihop or higher-order semantics were introduced in these Wave 3 files.
structured_tensions: Explicit tensions were preserved only where the raw source clearly earned a current-vocabulary target.
